phase_name: WuciOS v2.4 Euclid Trial Phase 3C-E — OpenBSD Reference Preparation
direct_rootfs_assumptions_insufficient_b: OpenBSD reference preparation is not a Linux rootfs package-manager operation
OpenBSD reference status is not rootfs generation or package-manager installation
OpenBSD reference evidence requires runtime and acquisition policy that Phase 3C-E does not authorize
store_root_assumptions_insufficient_beca: OpenBSD reference preparation does not use a Nix or Guix declarative store-root model
OpenBSD reference preparation requires install media, source, runtime, and package-admin policy rather than store realization policy
yocto_assumptions_insufficient_because: OpenBSD reference preparation is not BitBake-driven image construction
OpenBSD reference preparation does not use Yocto layers, recipes, machine configuration, or distro configuration
allowed_l2_actions: generate non-artifact reference scaffold files under build/wucios
generate OpenBSD reference input placeholder manifests
generate future command manifests as non-executable policy artifacts
do not boot, install, download, clone, package, virtualize, image, inspect, or score anything
forbidden_actions: git clone for OpenBSD src, ports, xenocara, mirror, or related source acquisition
curl or wget for OpenBSD media, sets, packages, ports, snapshots, signatures, source archives, or mirror download
objectives: Define controlled OpenBSD reference preparation rules.
Separate OpenBSD reference preparation from direct-rootfs, store-root, and Yocto assumptions.
Define future evidence requirements without executing them.
Generate optional non-artifact scaffolding only when explicitly authorized.
explicit_non_goals: No OpenBSD package or admin command.
No ports tree or install media download.
